scenarios.name: baseline — swap widget renders, trade history queryable

expected.notes: No execution; assert defi-swap-widget mounts with asset-from-select, capital-input, execute-button (disabled) and trade-history is reachable.

scenarios.name: buy-leg — SWAP USDC → ETH (acquire at lower venue price)

expected.notes: First leg of the price-dispersion arb — buy ETH where price is lower. SOR routes across Uniswap/Curve/Balancer.

scenarios.name: sell-leg — SWAP ETH → USDC (sell at higher venue price)

expected.notes: Second leg — sell ETH acquired in buy-leg at a higher cross-venue price, capturing the spread.

scenarios.name: second arb cycle appends two more SWAP rows

expected.notes: Confirm ledger keeps appending on repeated arb cycles — important for high-frequency arb strategies.
Reactive-only — slippage tolerance has a direct impact on arb profitability; assert expected-output differs.
